title: Vote Yes on 1!
summary: As Alaskans, we have watched as salmon returns have declined across the state. Our 60-year-old laws have become outdated and ineffectual and it’s finally time to take a stand for our salmon. Ballot Measure 1 aims to bring transparency, balance and a responsible approach to large-scale development pr...

title: November 2018 Back Page – Winter Is Upon us
summary: It hardly seems possible but Thanksgiving will be here in just a few weeks and we will be gathering with family and friends to celebrate the bounty of the land and the blessings we all enjoy in this great state.
